Descriptive.prompt: Write a detailed, factual description of this image. Cover the main subject, setting, colors, composition and any visible text. Do not speculate about anything not visible.

Short caption.prompt: Write a single concise sentence describing this image.

Booru tag list.prompt: Write a comma-separated list of Booru-style tags describing this image.

training prompt.prompt: Write a stable diffusion training prompt for this image.

Tag-guided description.prompt:
Write a detailed, factual description of this image.

The picture was already qualified by these tags: {{tags}}. Treat them as ground truth: stay consistent with them and do not contradict them, but describe only what is actually visible.
